memory.summary: The leisure option feels tempting given my low stress, but the term project looming until Thursday makes me hesitate to waste this free afternoon.

desires: To sit with my close friends in cohort_3 and feel that sense of belonging, especially since I'm feeling a bit drained by the looming project.
To quietly get this trivial chore done so I can stop worrying about it and fully immerse myself in the group dynamic without distraction.
To avoid any friction or conflict today; I just want to be agreeable and keep the peace while I slowly chip away at the term project.

goals.description: Finish the quick_chore immediately to clear my mind, then head straight to cohort_3 for a meal and decompression.
goals.rationale: As an Affiliation/Avoidant/Deliberate persona, I need the cognitive load of the chore off my plate before entering the social space with friends. Leaving it unfinished would create low-level anxiety that ruins the belonging I crave right now. The project is due in three days; there is no urgency to start it today, so deferring it preserves my energy for the relationship maintenance that matters most.

agent.last_reasoning: Clearing this trivial item now removes a low-level anxiety anchor before I join cohort_3 for our meal. It preserves my energy for the relationship maintenance that matters most, even though the term project deadline is distant.
